author: arnetheduck
content:
for the ssz engine api, I cannot join the call but here's some feedback I would raise - full text in the [github](https://github.com/ethereum/pm/issues/2145#issuecomment-4934505945) issue:

* Migrating the spec to OpenAPI / swagger - same as beacon / web3 / builder api, the execution spec is the remaining sore thumb here
* Rooting all paths in `/eth/vX/engine` - beacon lives under `/eth/vX/beacon` so it's natural for this part to simply extend the eth namespace with another part (
* Adding `eth_getHeads` which returns an array of `(hash, number)` tuples with specific conditions (see github)

The above request moves the execution client in the direction of behaving like a "library", ie with some minimal expectations of behaviour that the CL can use to [top up](hackmd.io/siEIwl9QTlODSZ6DYH3iqg) execution blocks.
